title: Snow and moss overhangs - Deep Origins Overlays
description: Universal snow and moss carpet overlays add-on for Deep Origins Overlays - Requires OptiFine or Continuity
body:
![Deep Origins Overlays Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0816daa281ca0de1b394e87edb67e9816d4bfa5e.png) ![Snow and moss overhangs add-on](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75d7140495184584f74c132f605e030f6d038645.png) [![Available on CurseForge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0115db48e5f0f3e08ee5064bb15fb5d28f19558a.png)][CurseForge][![Join my Discord server !](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38907640ad49dfc65a3e9f8108272facca85a02e.png)][discord] ![Requires OptiFine or Continuity](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c839058144529911f09e6c3260f4f1a2dd9a07e6.png) [![Download OptiFine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9f6e7755ccff6b26440c946421cce156f37b88d.png)][OptiFine][![Download Continuity](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa9465e27ce45ec5b88079cd4dad5c03019fa989.png)][continuity] # ![About this pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9070706c60607b4fdcbd56cd1f1832913b87b2c9.png) **Deep Origins Overlays - Snow and moss overhangs add-on** is an add-on texture pack for [Deep Origins Overlays](https://mosrinth.com/resourcepack/deep-origins-overlays) that adds universal snow and moss carpet overlays while keeping the deep origins of Vanilla Minecraft. This pack requires Optifine or Continuity (for Fabric users) to work, otherwise the textures won't show.
# ![Credits](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8e0d99ebbe2e4f8fca1990da9d630da7636f562.png) Thanks to **Jappa** for the original textures from Minecraft Feel free to re-use this pack for another project, as long as you credit me **and use the GNU GPLv3 license.**
# ![# Also see](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/980695/description_f51b0cb6-9ed1-4939-bda0-18e2611c16c9.png)  [![Deep Origins GUI Overhaul](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c754ac5cbc00b825003c5a78f6f4b22ab007d9e.png)](https://www.modrinth.com/resourcepack/deep-origins-gui-overhaul "Deep Origins GUI Overhaul") [![Deep Origins Overlays](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc94f5571767332df3d61615a35b7d2b8142b7c8.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/deep-origins-overlays)
# ![Changelog](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46cf181c5dad741f8ac9f581de3e6f363eecf14a.png) ### Beta channel:
Beta v1.0b: Original beta release.
